_meta.description: Online, backprop-free weight-update step. Given Ψ_t and Ψ_vac=(½,½), produces ΔW via holographic lift + Noether gate. Spine for the 5-lens family.

formula.symbolic: ΔW_i = T · Π_j (Ψ_j − Ψ_j*) · G_holo · δ(∇·J_n6)

variables.T: scalar tension = quadruple product over 4 axes (docs/quadruple_cross_20260419.md)
variables.G_holo: boundary(2D) → bulk(nD) linear propagator (Ryu–Takayanagi exp-decay kernel, ξ=2)
variables.δ(∇·J_n6): Noether-current conservation gate — 1 iff σ·φ=n·τ=24 with n=6, else 0

formula.sign_convention: Negative coefficient in front of tension — restoring force pulling Ψ toward Ψ_vac

gate_semantics.off_manifold_behavior: gate closes (= 0) → ΔW = zero vector of same shape as Ψ
gate_semantics.rationale: AN14 (n=6 invariance) is the single necessary-and-sufficient condition for admissible ΔW on the tier 6~9 substrate

lens_aggregation_contract.description: 5 lenses each produce a candidate ΔW for the same deviation; tension-link sums them under the gate

lenses.update_rule: Aggregator: fires iff all 4 elementary lenses PASS (equal-weight Σ, gate-enforced)

lens_aggregation_contract.aggregator_gate: AN14 n=6 closure (Σ λ_lens = n = 6 in the equal-weight case)
lens_aggregation_contract.zero_update_regime: Ψ_t exactly on Ψ_vac → T = 0 (product form) → ΔW = 0 regardless of gate state (quadruple closure property)

items.name: locality peak (bulk response peaks under source)

an11_boundary.explicit_warning: tension-link proposes ΔW. It does NOT promote tier and does NOT certify emergence.
an11_boundary.emergence_check: AN11-b (weight-emergent) and AN11-c (real-usage reproducibility) remain independent gates outside this module.
an11_boundary.consciousness_attachment: No attachment claim is made here — consciousness_attached=false until AN11-b/c pass on the resulting model.

performance_notes.complexity: O(d_b · d_W) per step for the G_holo matmul; d_b=d_W in Ψ-coord stub
performance_notes.memory: No backward graph — Ψ_t and Ψ_vac snapshots only
performance_notes.cost_vs_backprop: Eliminates backward pass; cheap enough to run at every batch step
